caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a brown wooden podium, delivering a speech against a backdrop of textured, dark green stone walls. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt paired with a light-colored sleeveless vest. Two microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. In the first frame, he is gesturing with his right hand, pointing upward with his index finger. By the second frame, he has lowered his hand and clasped both hands together in front of him. In the third frame, he remains in a similar posture with his hands clasped, while in the final frame, he begins to move his arms away from his center, with his left hand resting on the edge of the podium. To his right, a decorative vertical column with gold accents and small pink flowers is visible. No text or logos appear on screen.
